'''Carababba tabac''', was a kind of [[tabac]] smoked in [[Cigarra/Legends|cigarras]]. [[Niles Ferrier]] was known to smoke carababba tabac. Due to this distinctive smell, [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] were able to notice his presence on several occasions.

{{Stub}}
